text: Welcome to third grade reading. Reading logs are due Mondays - please sign your child's log after their nightly reading.

District winter break update for Desert Willow Elementary families. The last day of instruction before the break is Friday December 18, with an early 12:30 PM release. Winter recess runs Monday December 21 through Friday January 1, and classes resume Monday January 4. Please note this final schedule supersedes the earlier draft calendar that had the last instructional day on December 21.

Reminder that Friday December 18 is an early release at 12:30 PM for all Desert Willow students ahead of winter recess. There is no reading log due the week of December 21. Reading logs resume the week we return, Monday January 4.
